title: Innovation in the Judicial System in Brazil
event: III International Congress of Law and Artificial Intelligence
description: Conference talk on how the Brazilian Judicial System is embracing technology to improve access to justice and efficiency.

title: The Problem of Automated Facial Recognition Technologies in Brazil: Social Countermovements and the New Frontiers of Fundamental Rights
description: Presented an analysis of automated facial recognition in Brazil, examining its implications for privacy, discrimination, surveillance, and the role of social countermovements in contesting the expansion of high-risk AI systems.

title: Innovation in the Court of Justice
event: I Encontro Mineiro de Laboratórios de Inovação
organisation: UAILab, Tribunal de Justiça de Minas Gerais
description: Talk on innovation in the judiciary, drawing on my work at the Innovation Centre of the State Court of Justice of Minas Gerais. I discussed how innovation initiatives can improve judicial services, institutional procedures, user experience, and access to justice within public courts.
